AuditorResults.Description: All SLOs for payment-service are meeting their targets. Availability at 99.98 percent vs 99.9 target. Latency p99 at 320 ms vs 500 ms target.
Operation-level metrics healthy across all 4 operations. No fault or error spikes in the last 1 hour.
SLO breach: AddToCart availability at 98.2 percent vs 99.9 percent target. Error budget 78 percent consumed in the last 24 hours.
Operation AddToCart shows a 4x fault rate increase in the last 45 minutes. Dependency cart-db dynamodb writes throttling.
Latency SLO trending toward breach. p99 currently at 840 ms vs 1000 ms target. Trend up 35 percent from baseline.
Search operation 5xx rate elevated at 1.8 percent vs typical 0.3 percent baseline.
